docs.title: Blocker App
docs.text:
Welcome to SimLogica.com, the home of Blocker Smart Call Controller App.

Transform annoying phone calls into pleasant notifications and take back control of your phone!

Blocker is an innovative call management app designed to handle incoming mobile calls on your terms.

Get it on Google Play

docs.title: Blocker Smart Call Controller
docs.text:
Tired of loud, disruptive spam rings? Blocker replaces annoying unknown calls with short, pleasant sound notifications — bringing peace of mind and focus back to your daily life.

Spam calls will never break your concentration again. Loud, unexpected rings are a thing of the past!

docs.title: 🛠️ How does Blocker work?
docs.text:
Blocker intercepts incoming calls and follows a personalized handling strategy based on who is calling.

You define the rules for three contact groups:

⭐FAVORITES 😃CONTACTS ❓UNKNOWN The contacts you favorited in your phonebook. (Not speed dial) The other contacts in your phonebook. Numbers not in your phonebook.

For each group, choose one of three actions:

🔔RING 🔮NOTIFY 🔕DROP The normal, loud phone ring. Blocker's signature feature! Silences the main ringer but plays a customizable, short sound with vibration. The visual call screen still appears. Sends the call immediately to voicemail without waking up your screen. Total silence.

(All handled calls remain visible in your phone's default Call History. Blocker simply stops the loud ringing for groups you choose to Notify or Drop).

docs.title: 🌟 Powerful Core Features
docs.text: Emergency Bypass Expecting an urgent call from an unknown number? If the same number calls 3 times within 15 minutes, Blocker will automatically allow it to RING. Beat Spam Peacefully Set UNKNOWN callers to NOTIFY. You get a subtle, pleasant "ping" instead of a loud disruption. Pick up if it's convenient or let it slide. Quick Presets Switch effortlessly between our built-in Default and Focus modes. All-in-One Settings Menu We’ve grouped all your phone’s scattered call-related settings into one fast, easy-to-access menu.

docs.title: 🧘 Regain Your Focus
docs.text:
Blocker was built to let you focus on what truly matters. After just one week of using Blocker, you’ll feel at peace with your phone. It’s perfect for:

• Studying or working deeply • Important business meetings • Meditating or resting • Getting rid of daily spam interruptions

docs.title: 🔒 Your Privacy First
docs.text: Blocker is extremely lightweight, blazing-fast, and leaves a negligible battery footprint. Most importantly, it is built with a strict privacy-first design. We do not collect, store, or share your personal data or call logs. Check our Privacy Policy.

docs.title: 💎 Try It Free!
docs.text:
Experience the Blocker way for free and feel the difference! Blocker is free to use with no limitations on its core features.

Get it on Google Play

If Blocker brings peace to your daily life, please consider supporting our future development by purchasing it via a small, one-time in-app purchase (set to the minimum price allowed in your region!).

Download Blocker today and put yourself peacefully back in control.

(Enjoying the app? Please leave us a 5-star review!)

docs.title: Configuring Blocker Permissions
docs.text: Blocker needs two permissions from your Andoid Device to work properly.

docs.title: Contacts Permission
docs.text:
Blocker uses contacts permissions to handle the incoming call. The calling number is compared with your Phone Book to see if it is a Favorite number, a regular Contact in your Phone Book or if it is Unknown.

When Blocker runs, it asks for the Contacts Permission with a top alert banner. Click that banner and Andoid will ask you to allow that.

If you accidentally deny, follow the Manually allowing Contacts Permission section.

docs.title: Setting Blocker as device's Caller ID and Antispam App
docs.text:
Blocker needs to be your device's Caller ID and Antispam App to be allowed to handle incoming calls.

Under the hood, that will allow a tiny and fast native-coded Blocker internal service to be called by the Android System. This service will do its magic based on the rules and sounds you configured in Blocker.

No data is collected, as we are never tired to repeat. Check our Privacy Policy

docs.title: Manually allowing Contacts Permission
docs.text:
In case you previously denied the Contacts Permission, Android demands a bit more manual setup that we make straightforward to follow in four easy steps.

Blocker will ask you for the Contacts Permission as usual, but when you click the top banner, the App's Setup Screen will come up instead. Click on Permissions there:

Then click on Contacts and then on Allow in the following screen:

That is it! Then press the Android's back button three times to go back to Blocker.

docs.title: Is my data safe?
docs.text: Yes, all data is stored locally on your device and protected by Android's system. We do not upload your personal data to any server. Read more in our Privacy Policy.

docs.title: How do I configure the necessary Android Permissions?
docs.text: Read our extremely easy guide on that.

docs.title: What happens with the calls that Blocker handles?
docs.text:
All calls that Blocker handles are shown in your Phone Call App's history. Blocker just gets in to prevent the call to RING for those groups you chose to NOTIFY and DROP.

Your call app will still show all notifications from received calls that you did not pick up.

docs.title: What happens if my device is Muted or Do Not Disturb is On?
docs.text:
Blocker follows your device's Mute or Do Not Disturb settings. If your device is muted or Do Not Disturb is on, Blocker will not play short sounds on incoming calls. And calls will not ring. Unless they are PRIORITY CALLS following your device's settings. This ensures that you are not disturbed by unwanted calls when you have set your device to a quiet mode.

Blocker will follow your DND rules and also allow Emergency calls from Emergency Services.

docs.title: Does Block filter WhatsApp or Teams calls?
docs.text: Currently, Blocker does not filter WhatsApp or Teams calls, nor any other call from apps. It only handles phone calls. This is a technical limitation of the Android platform.

docs.title: Is there an iPhone version?
docs.text: Not yet but we are analyzing the possibility.

docs.title: Can a call be identified as "UNKNOWN" by Blocker, but the Phone Call App shows it as a Contact?
docs.text:
Very rarely. It is possible. Some Phone Call Apps have a very aggressive strategy to identify contacts, which, by the way, can sometimes lead to a mismatch. Especially if the number in the Phone Book was recorded without the long-distance prefix.

Blocker tries to align with most vendor strategies to identify contacts.

docs.title: Can Blocker rarely miss a call and let the phone ring by mistake?
docs.text:
Unfortunately, yes. This happens because of external reasons, not Blocker.

This happens because of a few reasons. Heavy system load, device aggressive battery optimizations, processes dormancy. Sometimes also Android fails to handle the incomming call to blocker and rings anyway.

Make sure Blocker is not in an app dormant list.

Some spammers may have GSM network privileged access and put calls with special flags, like an emergency call, that Android does not handle to Blocker. They also put two calls in a very fast sequency to trick Android. And the call firmware may sometimes not be fast and smart enough to deal with those exceptional and rare cases.

docs.title: So Blocker isn't perfect, but it is worth it?
docs.text:
YES! For sure! 100%. All the users that tested Blocker in its early phase reported starting to have a more healthy and peaceful relationship with mobile phone calls.

It is a life changer for most of them. Don't take our word for granted. Try Blocker for a few days and see for yourself.

docs.title: Can I temporarily disable Blocker?
docs.text:
Yes. Setting all calls to RING is the easiest way.

But if for some reason you need Blocker temporarily not to intercept calls, go to Settings → Default Apps → Caller ID and Antispam App and chose None or another app for the moment.

Blocker will then show you the top banner asking your permission to be the "Caller ID and Antispam App" whenever you please to do so again.

docs.title: How do I restore my purchase?
docs.text: It should be automatically handled by Blocker. But you can manually click on Settings > Restore purchase. Make sure you are logged in your device into the same Google account used to buy the app.

docs.title: What to do if the app is crashing?
docs.text: That should not be happening at all. Our apologies. Please try clearing the app cache or reinstalling it. If the issue persists, contact us specifying your device model and OS version. We will do our best to fix it as soon as possible.

docs.title: Is Blocker an Antispam App?
docs.text:
We think it is even better. Set UNKNOWN callers to NOTIFY. You get a subtle, pleasant "ping" instead of a loud disruption. Pick up if it's convenient or let it slide.

Spam will never be a problem any more.

docs.title: Privacy Policy
docs.text:
Effective Date: February 22, 2026

This Privacy Policy applies to the SimLogica.com website and mobile applications, developed and maintained by the SimLogica.com team, a group of independent developers based in Brazil.

This policy is designed to inform you regarding our policies on the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data. We operate with a strict user-privacy-first mindset.

docs.title: 1. Information Collection and Use
docs.text: The short answer is: We do not collect, store, or transmit your personal data. However, for our paid applications we do receive limited information regarding your purchase from the app store platform.

docs.title: App Purchases (Google Play)
docs.text:
When you purchase one of our applications via the Google Play Store, Google processes your payment and shares limited transaction details with us through the Google Play Developer Console. This information includes your Google account email address, approximate location (country), and an order ID.

We use this provided email address strictly for these purposes:

  • Account Management.
  • Verifying purchases and issuing refunds if requested.
  • Providing customer support.
  • Authenticate you on our website and services.
  • Fulfilling tax and accounting obligations.
  • Legal and compliance.

We do not collect, store, or use this email address to send you marketing campaigns, newsletters, or sell it to third parties. Nor we have access to your financial information (like credit card numbers).

docs.title: Blocker (Android App)
docs.text:
Blocker is designed to function entirely on your device. We do not collect, save, or share any personal information, usage metrics, or analytics from the app. Any data required for the app to function remains locally on your device and is never transmitted to our servers or any third-party servers by us.

Blocker requires specific Android permissions (such as Call Log access) to function. This access is used only locally on your device to identify or block calls and is never transmitted to us or any third party.

docs.title: SimLogica.com (Website)
docs.text: The SimLogica website is meant for informational purposes. We do not use proprietary cookies, tracking scripts, or analytics tools to monitor or collect data from visitors.

docs.title: 2. Third-Party Services
docs.text:
While we do not collect any personal data ourselves, our app and website rely on third-party infrastructure. These third-party service providers have their own privacy policies addressing how they handle data.

  • Google Play Services: The Blocker app is distributed via the Google Play Store and uses Google Play Services for core Android functionality. Google may collect diagnostic and usage data as part of the Android operating system environment.
    • Link to Google Privacy Policy
  • GitHub Pages: The SimLogica website is currently hosted on GitHub Pages. When you visit the site, GitHub may collect standard web server logs, such as your IP address, to maintain the security and integrity of their hosting service.
    • Link to GitHub Privacy Statement

docs.title: 3. Data Security
docs.text: We value your trust in using our app and visiting our site. Because our software does not actively collect your personal information, there is no risk of your usage data being leaked or breached from our end. For the limited purchase transaction data (such as your email address) that we can access as developers, we rely entirely on the robust security infrastructure provided by the Google Play Developer Console. We do not export or store this information on external databases.

docs.title: 4. User Rights (LGPD, GDPR, CCPA)
docs.text:
As developers based in Brazil, we respect the guidelines set by the Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), as well as international frameworks like the GDPR and CCPA.

Because our app and website do not collect personal data, there is no usage data for us to provide, correct, or delete upon request. You maintain full ownership and control of your local app data on your device.

Regarding the purchase information (such as your email address) provided to us by Google Play: you have the right to inquire about this data. However, please note that we cannot delete your purchase history from Google's servers, as Google retains those for financial, legal, and tax compliance. To manage or delete your payment and transaction data, you must do so directly through your Google Account settings.

docs.title: 5. Children's Privacy
docs.text: Our services do not address anyone under the age of 13. Furthermore, because we do not collect any data from any users, we inherently do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children.

docs.title: 6. Changes to This Privacy Policy
docs.text: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.

docs.title: 7. Contact Us
docs.text: Before contacting us, we kindly ask that you review the documentation on this website, as many common questions are already answered here. If you still have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights regarding your Google Play purchase information, you can reach us at: simlogica.com (...at...) gmail.com.

docs.title: Terms of Use
docs.text:
Effective Date: February 22, 2026

This Terms of Use apply to the SimLogica website and the Blocker Android application, developed and maintained by the SimLogica.com team, a group of independent developers based in Brazil.

docs.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
docs.text: By downloading or using the Blocker application ("the App") or visiting the SimLogica website ("the Website"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. These services are provided by Danilo Araujo and the SimLogica development team (collectively referred to as "we," "us," or "our"). If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Website or download the App.

docs.title: 2. License and Acceptable Use
docs.text:
Upon purchasing the App through the Google Play Store, we grant you a personal, worldwide, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to use the App on your personal devices.

You agree not to:

  • Modify, decompile, reverse-engineer, or attempt to extract the source code of the App or Website.
  • Distribute, license, sell, or publicly make available the App without our express written permission.
  • Use the App or Website for any unlawful or malicious purpose.
  • Attempt to bypass any security features or licensing mechanisms embedded within the App.

docs.title: 3. Intellectual Property
docs.text: All code, design, branding, text, and graphics associated with the Blocker App and the SimLogica Website are the exclusive intellectual property of SimLogica and its creators. Your purchase grants you a license to use the software, but it does not transfer any ownership rights to you.

docs.title: 4. Third-Party Services and Purchases
docs.text:
The Blocker App is distributed and sold exclusively through the Google Play Store. Google handles all financial transactions, billing, and payment processing entirely.

We do not have access to your payment information (such as credit card details).

Any issues related to payment failures, billing errors, or app store platform outages must be resolved directly through Google Play support.

We reserve the right to change the price of the App at any time, though this will not affect users who have already purchased it.

docs.title: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
docs.text:
Please read this section carefully, as it limits our legal obligations to you.

The App and Website are provided strictly on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. While our team strives to create high-quality, reliable software, we make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the software's performance.

We do not guarantee that the App will be entirely free of bugs, errors, or interruptions.

We do not guarantee compatibility with all past, present, or future Android devices or operating system updates.

Due to the restrictive nature of Android OS variations across different manufacturers, we cannot guarantee that the App will successfully block 100% of intended content or functions at all times. You use the App at your own risk.

docs.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
docs.text:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, SimLogica, its developers, and its collaborators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, the App or Website.

This includes, but is not limited to, damages for loss of data, loss of device functionality, or personal distress resulting from the App failing to function as expected. In no event shall our total liability to you for any damages exceed the amount you paid to purchase the App.

docs.title: 7. Privacy
docs.text: Your privacy is incredibly important to us. Our Privacy Policy strictly governs our data handling practices. By agreeing to these Terms of Use, you also acknowledge that you have read and understand our Privacy Policy, which states that our software operates locally and collects no personal usage data.

docs.title: 8. Governing Law
docs.text: These Terms of Use shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. Any disputes arising out of or relating to these terms will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Brasília, Distrito Federal, Brazil.

docs.title: 9. Changes to These Terms
docs.text: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms of Use at any time to reflect updates to our software, changes in the law, or the formal incorporation of our company. We will provide notice of significant changes by updating the "Effective Date" at the top of this document. Continued use of the App or Website after changes are published constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

docs.title: 10. Contact Us
docs.text: Before contacting us, we kindly ask that you review the documentation on this website, as many common questions are already answered here. If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, you can reach our team at: simlogica.com (...at...) gmail.com.

docs.title: Blocker App
docs.text:
Bem-vindo à SimLogica, criadora do App Blocker Controle Inteligente de Chamadas.

Transforme o toque alto das chamadas telefônicas em notificações agradáveis e reobtenha o controle do seu telefone!

O Blocker é um app inovador de gestão de chamadas telefônicas criado para fazer o seu telefone funcionar do seu jeito.

Disponível no Google Play

docs.title: Blocker Controle Inteligente de Chamadas
docs.text:
Basta de toques altos e chamadas de spam intrusivas. O Blocker substitue chamadas desconhecidas perturbadoras por toques curtos e agradáveis trazendo de volta paz de espírito e foco ao seu dia-a-dia.

Chamadas de spam jamais perturbarão a sua concentração. Toques altos e inesperados são coisas do passado!

docs.title: 🛠️ Como o Blocker funciona?
docs.text:
O Blocker intercepta chamadas telefônicas e segue uma estratégia personalizada para tratamento de acordo com quem origina a chamada.

Você define as regras para os três grupos de chamadas:

⭐FAVORITOS 😃CONTATOS ❓DESCONHECIDOS Os contatos favoritados na sua agenda. (Não são os discagem rápida) Os outros contatos da sua agenda. Números que não estão na agenda.

Para cada grupo, escolha uma destas três ações:

🔔TOCAR 🔮NOTIFICAR 🔕DESLIGAR O tradicional toque alto do telefone. A função principal do Blocker! Silencia o toque padrão, mas toca um som curto e agradável, acompanhado de uma vibração e uma notificação na tela. Envia a chamada imediatamente para a caixa de voz sem acender a tela.

(Todas as chamadas interceptadas pelo Blocker continuam visíveis no seu histórico de chamadas do telefone. O Blocker simplesmente impede o toque alto para os grupos que você escolheu Notificar ou Desligar).

docs.title: 🌟 Funções Super Úteis
docs.text: Permissão de chamadas de urgência Esperando uma chamada importante de um número desconhecido? Se o mesmo número ligar 3 vezes dentro de 15 minutos, o Blocker vai automaticamente permitir a ligação TOCAR. Combata o Spam de forma pacífica Defina chamadas DESCONHECIDAS para NOTIFICAR. Você recebe um som discreto e agradável ao invés de um barulho agressivo. Responda quando for conveniente ou deixe passar. Predefinidos Rápidos Alterne entre nossos modos de ajustes predefinidos Padrão e Concentrar. Menu Completo de Configurações Agrupamos todas as configurações relacionadas a chamadas telefônicas do seu dispositivo em um único menu de fácil acesso.

docs.title: 🧘 Retome o Foco
docs.text:
O Blocker foi concebido para permitir que você foque no que realmente interessa. Após apenas uma semana de uso, irá perceber que estarás em paz com o seu telefone. É perfeito para:

• Estudar ou trabalhar concentrado • Uma importante reunião de negócios • Meditar ou descansar • Se livrar das interrupções diárias das chamadas de spam

docs.title: 🔒 Sua Privacidade em Primeiro Lugar
docs.text:
Blocker is extremely lightweight, blazing-fast, and leaves a negligible battery footprint. Most importantly, it is built with a strict privacy-first design. We do not collect, store, or share your personal data or call logs. Check our Privacy Policy.

O Blocker é extremamente leve, rápido e não impacta de forma perceptiva no consumo de bateria do seu dispositivo. Além disso, ele é projetado com uma abordagem de privacidade rigorosa, garantindo que seus dados pessoais e registros de chamadas não sejam coletados, armazenados ou compartilhados. Consulte nossa Política de Privacidade para obter mais informações.

docs.title: 💎 Experimente Gratuitamente!
docs.text:
Experimente gratuitamente o Blocker e descubra como ele pode transformar sua experiência com chamadas! O uso do Blocker é grátis sem limitações nas funcionalidades principais.

Get it on Google Play

Se o Blocker trouxer paz para sua vida cotidiana, pedimos que considere apoiar o nosso desenvolvimento futuro comprando-o por meio de uma pequena compra in-app única (definida com o preço mínimo permitido para a sua região!).

Faça o download do Blocker hoje e coloque-se de volta em paz e no controle do seu telefone!

(Gostando do app? Considere deixar uma avaliação 5-estrelas!)

docs.title: Configurando as Permissões do Blocker
docs.text: O Blocker precisa de duas permissões do seu dispositivo Android para funcionar corretamente.

docs.title: Permissão de Contatos
docs.text:
O Blocker usa a permissão de contatos para gerenciar a chamada recebida. O número que recebido é comparado com a sua Agenda Telefônica para verificar se é um número Favorito, um Contato regular na sua Agenda ou se é Desconhecido.

Quando o Blocker é iniciado, ele solicita a Permissão de Contatos por meio de um banner de alerta no topo da tela/ecrã. Clique nesse banner e o Android irá pedir que você permita o acesso.

Se você negar acidentalmente, siga a seção Concedendo manualmente a Permissão de Contatos.

docs.title: Definindo o Blocker como App de Identificação de Chamadas e Antispam do dispositivo
docs.text:
O Blocker precisa ser o App de Identificação de Chamadas e Antispam do seu dispositivo para poder gerenciar as chamadas recebidas.

Internamente, isso permitirá que um serviço do Blocker, pequeno e rápido, desenvolvido em código nativo, seja acionado pelo Sistema Android. Esse serviço fará a sua mágica com base nas regras e sons que você configurou no Blocker.

Nenhum dado é coletado, como nunca nos cansamos de repetir. Confira a nossa Política de Privacidade

docs.title: Concedendo manualmente a Permissão de Contatos
docs.text:
Caso você tenha negado anteriormente a Permissão de Contatos, o Android exige uma configuração manual um pouco mais elaborada, que tornamos simples de seguir em quatro passos fáceis.

O Blocker irá solicitar a Permissão de Contatos como de costume, mas quando você clicar no banner superior, a Tela/Ecrã de Configuração do App será exibida no lugar. Clique em Permissões lá:

Em seguida, clique em Contatos e depois em Permitir na tela/ecrã seguinte:

É isso! Em seguida, pressione o botão Voltar do Android três vezes para retornar ao Blocker.

docs.title: Meus dados estão seguros?
docs.text: Sim, todos os dados são armazenados localmente no seu dispositivo e protegidos pelo sistema do Android. Não enviamos os seus dados pessoais para nenhum servidor. Leia mais na nossa Política de Privacidade.

docs.title: Como configuro as Permissões do Blocker no Android?
docs.text: Leia nosso guia extremamente fácil sobre isso.

docs.title: O que acontece com as chamadas que o Blocker gerencia?
docs.text:
Todas as chamadas que o Blocker gerencia são apresentadas no histórico do seu Aplicativo de Chamadas. O Blocker intervém apenas para impedir que a chamada TOQUE nos grupos que você escolheu para NOTIFICAR e REJEITAR.

O seu aplicativo de chamadas continuará a apresentar todas as notificações de chamadas recebidas que você não atendeu.

docs.title: O que acontece se meu dispositivo estiver Mudo ou o Modo Não Perturbe estiver Ligado?
docs.text:
O Blocker respeita as configurações de Mudo ou Não Perturbe do seu dispositivo. Se seu dispositivo estiver mudo ou o Modo Não Perturbe estiver ligado, Blocker não irá tocar um som curto nas chamadas recebidas. E as chamadas não irão tocar, a menos que sejam CHAMADAS PRIORITÁRIAS segundo as definições do seu dispositivo. Isso garante que você não seja incomodado por chamadas indesejadas quando você configurou seu dispositivo para um modo silencioso.

O Blocker irá seguir suas regras de Não Perturbe e também permitirá chamadas de emergência de serviços de emergência.

docs.title: O Blocker filtra chamadas de WhatsApp ou Teams?
docs.text: No momento, o Blocker não filtra chamadas de WhatsApp ou Teams, nem de qualquer outra chamada proveniente de aplicativos. Ele apenas lida com chamadas telefônicas. Esta é uma limitação técnica da plataforma Android.

docs.title: Existe uma versão para iPhone?
docs.text: Ainda não, mas estamos analisando a possibilidade.

docs.title: Pode uma chamada ser identificada como "DESCONHECIDO" pelo Blocker, mas o Aplicativo de Chamadas mostra como um Contato legítimo?
docs.text: Muito raramente, é possível. Alguns Aplicativos de Chamadas têm uma estratégia muito agressiva para identificar contatos, o que às vezes pode levar a um falso positivo. Em particular, se o número na agenda foi registrado sem o prefixo de longa distância.

docs.title: O Blocker pode raramente deixar passar uma chamada e deixar o telefone tocar por engano?
docs.text:
Infelizmente, sim. Isso acontece por causa do Android, não do Blocker. O Android às vezes falha em encaminhar a chamada ao Blocker e ela toca mesmo assim.

Isso ocorre por alguns motivos: alta carga do sistema, otimizações agressivas de bateria do dispositivo, dormência de processos.

Certifique-se de que o Blocker não está numa lista de apps em modo dormência.

Alguns spammers podem ter acesso privilegiado à rede GSM e realizar chamadas com marcadores especiais, como uma chamada de emergência, que o Android não encaminha ao Blocker. Eles também realizam duas chamadas em sequência muito rápida para enganar o Android. E o firmware de chamadas às vezes pode não ser rápido e inteligente o suficiente para lidar com esses casos excepcionais e raros.

docs.title: Então o Blocker não é perfeito, mas vale a pena?
docs.text:
SIM! Com certeza! 100%. Todos os usuários que testaram o Blocker para o seu lançamento relataram começar a ter uma relação mais saudável e tranquila com as chamadas de celular.

É um divisor de águas no dia-a-dia para a maioria deles. Não tome nossa palavra como certeza. Teste o Blocker por alguns dias e veja por si.

docs.title: Posso desativar o Blocker temporariamente?
docs.text:
Sim. Deixar todas as chamadas no modo TOCAR é a forma mais fácil.

Mas se por algum motivo você precisar que o Blocker não intercepte chamadas temporariamente, vá em Configurações → Apps Padrão → App de Identificação de Chamadas e Antispam e escolha Nenhum ou outro app por enquanto.

O Blocker então mostrará o banner superior solicitando sua permissão para ser o "App de Identificação de Chamadas e Antispam" para sempre que desejar fazer isso novamente.

docs.title: Como restauro minha compra?
docs.text: O Blocker faz isso automaticamente. Mas se necessário, clique em Configurações > Restaurar compra. Certifique-se de estar conectado no seu dispositivo à mesma conta Google utilizada para comprar o app.

docs.title: O que fazer se o app estiver travando?
docs.text: Isso não deveria acontecer de jeito nenhum. Pedimos desculpas. Por favor, tente limpar o cache do app ou reinstalá-lo. Se o problema persistir, entre em contato conosco informando o modelo do seu dispositivo e a versão do Android. Faremos o nosso melhor para resolver o mais rápido possível.

docs.title: O Blocker é um App Antispam?
docs.text:
Acreditamos que o Blocker seja ainda melhor que os Apps Antispam tradicionais. Configure DESCONHECIDOS para NOTIFICAR. Você recebe um "ping" suave e agradável em vez de uma interrupção agressiva. Responda se for conveniente ou deixe passar.

Spam nunca mais será um problema.
